calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Saleemah D. Lindsey et al.
Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 10:47 a.m. and concluding at 11:13 a.m. (D505)

Al Levi Roundtree, Esq. representing Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank appeared via Zoom Video Conference.
Witness Anita Parks appeared via zoom.
Defendant Saleemah D. Lindsey not appearing.

The Plaintiff is to recover from the Defendant as follows:
Damages $55,913.22
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $5,943.40
Costs $604.05
Total Judgment $62,460.67
Proposed judgment as amended signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Continued To Jul-09-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
